requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website
of the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: the day it is placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the Directions under Part B shall come into force from January 1, 2026,
or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date").
requirements.object: January 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date")

requirements.full_sentence:
Any new Co-Lending Arrangements (CLAs) entered into after the effective date shall
be in compliance with the directions under Part B.
requirements.object: the directions under Part B

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that existing CLAs (i.e., the lending arrangements executed before
August 06, 2025) and new CLAs entered into prior to the effective date shall be in
compliance with the extant regulations.
requirements.object: the extant regulations

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined in the respective parts, shall have the
same meaning as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or any other relevant regulation or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory mod

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall acquire loans only from a transferor specified as a lender in
paragraph 13(4) unless specifically permitted.
requirements.object: a transferor specified as a lender in paragraph 13(4) unless specifically permitted

requirements.full_sentence:
Overseas branches of banks shall be permitted to:
(1) Acquire only 'not in default' loan exposures from a financial entity operating and
regulated as a bank in the host jurisdiction.
requirements.object: Acquire only 'not in default' loan exposures from a financial entity operating and regulated as a bank in the host jurisdiction

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Such acquisitions or transfers shall be in strict compliance with paragraph 27 of
these directions.
requirements.object: with paragraph 27 of these directions

requirements.full_sentence:
No bank shall undertake any loan transfers or acquisitions other than those
permitted under Part A of this direction and in the manner prescribed therein.
requirements.object: or acquisitions other than those permitted under Part A of this direction and in the manner prescribed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The above proviso shall be without prejudice to the provisions of Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025;
requirements.object: the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025

conditions: Provided that Regional Rural Banks
requirements.full_sentence: Provided that Regional Rural Banks;

conditions: if any, under the transfer agreement
requirements.full_sentence:
(5) "loan participation" means a transaction through which the transferor transfers all
or part of its economic interest in a loan exposure to transferee(s) without the actual
transfer of the loan contract, and the transferee(s) fund the transferor to the extent of
the economic interest transferred which may be equal to the principal, interest, fees
and other payments, if any, under the transfer agreement;
requirements.object: principal, interest, fees and other payments

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the transfer of economic interest under a loan participation shall only be
through a contractual transfer agreement between the transferor and transferee(s) with
the transferor remaining as the lender on record.
requirements.object: contractual transfer agreement between the transferor and transferee(s) with the transferor remaining as the lender on record

conditions: in case of loan participation
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of loan participation, the exposure of the transferee(s)
shall be to the underlying borrower and not to the transferor.
requirements.object: borrower and not to the transferor

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the transferor
and transferee(s) shall maintain capital according to the exposure to the underlying
borrower calculated based on the economic interest held by each post such transfer.
requirements.object: the exposure to the underlying borrower calculated based on the economic interest held by each post such transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
The applicable prudential norms, including the provisioning requirements, post the
transfer, shall be based on the above exposure treatment and the consequent
outstanding.
requirements.object: above exposure treatment and the consequent outstanding

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) "minimum holding period (MHP)" means the minimum period for which a transferor
must hold the loan exposures before the same is transferred to transferee(s);
requirements.object: before the same is transferred to transferee(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) "net book value (NBV)" means the funded outstanding in a loan exposure reduced
by the specific provisions made against such exposure;
requirements.object: a loan exposure reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure

conditions:
if it falls within the purview
of the above definition
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: A loan shall be categorised as personal loan if it falls within the purview
of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any
regulatory/ supervisory reporting.
requirements.object: loan if it falls within the purview of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any reg

requirements.full_sentence:
(10) "portfolio" means a set of loan exposures transferred together at a point of time
under the same transfer agreement;
requirements.object: exposures transferred together at a point of time under the same transfer agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that transfer agreements under which loans are transferred as a portfolio
shall list the details of the individual loan exposures which are transferred as a portfolio.
requirements.object: the individual loan exposures which are transferred as a portfolio

requirements.full_sentence:
(12) "time of transfer" means the point at which the associated risks and rewards, to
the extent of economic interest transferred and as documented in the loan
participation, assignment, or novation contract, become binding on the transferor and
transferee.
requirements.object: the associated risks and rewards, to the extent of economic interest transferred and as documented in the loan participation, assig
interest in loan exposures by the transferor to the transferee(s), with or without the transfer of the underlying loan contract

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Consequently, the transferee(s) shall "acquire" the loan exposures
following a loan transfer.
requirements.object: following a loan transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
(14) "transferee" means the entity to which the economic interest in a loan exposure
is transferred under Part A of these directions;
requirements.object: the economic interest in a loan exposure is transferred under Part A of these directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a transferee shall not be a person disqualified in terms of Section 29A
of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
requirements.object: in terms of Section 29A of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016

conditions:
in case of transfer of loan exposures of borrowers in whose
accounts instances of fraud have been detected by any lender
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of transfer of loan exposures of borrowers in whose
accounts instances of fraud have been detected by any lender, the transferee(s) shall
neither belong to the existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a
subsidiary / associate / related party etc.
requirements.object: existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a subsidiary / associate / related party etc

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation I: In market parlance, transferee may be alternatively referred to as the
assignee under assignment transactions and participant under loan participations,
wherever applicable.
requirements.object: as the assignee under assignment transactions and participant under loan participations
as in the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018

requirements.full_sentence:
and the term 'related
party' shall have the same meaning as in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
requirements.object: as in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation III: The responsibility for verifying and establishing that the transferee(s)
comply with the above provisos shall be with the transferor(s).

(15) "transferor" means the entity which transfers the economic interest in a loan
exposure under these directions;
requirements.object: the economic interest in a loan exposure under these directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In market parlance, transferor may be alternatively referred to as the
assignor under assignment transactions and grantor under loan participations,
wherever applicable
requirements.object: as the assignor under assignment transactions and grantor under loan participations

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy for transfer
and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy for transfer and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
These guidelines must, inter
alia, lay down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due
diligence, valuation, requisite IT systems for capture, storage and management of
data, risk management, periodic Board level oversight, etc.
requirements.object: down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due diligence, valuation, requisite IT systems for capture, stor

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the policy must
also ensure independence of functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and
personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from that of personnel involved in
originating the loans.
requirements.object: functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from tha

requirements.full_sentence:
All transactions must meet the requirements as detailed in the
policy.
requirements.object: detailed in the policy

requirements.full_sentence:
Loan transfers should result in transfer of economic interest without being
accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract.
requirements.object: economic interest without being accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract

requirements.full_sentence:
in take-out financing), the same shall be evaluated
against restructuring as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the roles and responsibilities of the transferor and
transferee(s) shall be clearly delineated contractually.

Lenders referred to in Paragraph 13(4), regardless of whether they are
transferors or otherwise, should not offer credit enhancements or liquidity facilities in
any form in the case of loan transfers.
requirements.object: liquidity facilities in any form in the case of loan transfers

requirements.full_sentence:
A loan transfer should result in immediate separation of the transferor from the
risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has
been transferred.
requirements.object: of the transferor from the risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has been tr

conditions: In case of any retained economic interest in the exposure by the transferor
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
In case of any retained economic interest in the exposure by the transferor, the loan
transfer agreement should clearly specify the distribution of the principal and interest
income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s).
requirements.object: of the principal and interest income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
However, it is reiterated that any retention of economic interest by the transferor must
not result in credit enhancement.

The transferee(s) should have the unfettered right to transfer or otherwise
dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest
transferred to them.
requirements.object: to transfer or otherwise dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest transferr

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The transferee(s) shall have no recourse to the transferor for any expenses or
losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted
under these guidelines.
requirements.object: the transferor for any expenses or losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted under th

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Further, the transferor / transferee(s) shall not be constrained to obtain consent
from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be, when it comes to resolution or
recovery in respect of the beneficial economic interest retained by or transferred to the
respective entity.
requirements.object: consent from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall have no obligation to re-acquire or fund the re-payment of
the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide
additional loans to the transferee(s) at any time except those arising out of breach of
warranties or representations made at the time of transfer.
requirements.object: re-acquire or fund the re-payment of the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide additi

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor should be able to demonstrate that a notice to this effect has been given
to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of such
obligation.
requirements.object: that a notice to this effect has been given to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of su

conditions: if the need arises
requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever security interest is held by the transferor in trust with the transferee(s)
as the beneficiaries, the transferee(s) shall ensure that a mutually agreed and binding
mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest, if the need arises, has been
properly documented and put in place.
requirements.object: agreed and binding mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest

conditions: where necessary as per the respective contracts
requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer of loans by transferor(s) must not contravene the rights of
underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third
parties), where necessary as per the respective contracts, should have been obtained.
requirements.object: underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third parties)

requirements.full_sentence:
Any rescheduling, restructuring or re-negotiation of the terms of the underlying
agreement/s attempted by permitted transferee(s) after the transfer of assets to the
<image>
transferee(s) shall be as per the provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
A transferor should notify RBI (Department of Supervision) of all instances
where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of
any representation or warranty.
requirements.object: Supervision) of all instances where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of any rep

requirements.full_sentence:
For domestic transactions, transferee(s) should ensure that the transferor has
strictly adhered to the MHP criteria in respect of loans acquired by them, as prescribed
in Chapter III of Part A of these directions.
requirements.object: has strictly adhered to the MHP criteria in respect of loans acquired by them, as prescribed in Chapter III of Part A of th

requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer as well as acquisition of exposures by overseas branches of Indian
banks shall be required to be in compliance with the requirements prescribed in these
directions, without derogation of any other statutory or regulatory provisions, including
those prescribed under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
requirements.object: in compliance with the requirements prescribed in these directions, without derogation of any other statutory or regulatory provisio

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, in jurisdictions which do not have regulations related to MHP, overseas
branches of Indian banks may acquire such exposures, save for those originated in
India, without the requirement of adhering to the MHP criteria.
requirements.object: do not have regulations related to MHP, overseas branches of Indian banks may acquire such exposures, save for those originat

requirements.full_sentence:
The extant instructions on outsourcing and the applicable provisions of Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be
complied with in all cases.
requirements.object: all cases

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of exposures that do not meet the requirements of these directions,
transferee(s) shall maintain capital charge equal to the actual exposure acquired.
requirements.object: to the actual exposure acquired

conditions: if it was not transferred at all in the first place
requirements.full_sentence:
In
such cases, the transferor shall continue to recognise the transferred loan in its
entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration
received shall be recognised as an advance.
requirements.object: transferred loan in its entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration received sha

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferee(s) may engage a servicing facility provider, which may also be
the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures.
requirements.object: provider, which may also be the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures

conditions: If a bank
requirements.full_sentence:
If a bank, including a transferor, performs the role of a servicing facility provider
for the transferee(s) after the loan transfer has occurred, it shall ensure that the
following conditions are fulfilled:
(1) The nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of
performance shall be clearly specified in a written agreement.
requirements.object: conditions are fulfilled: (1) The nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of performance shall be

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) There should not be any recourse to the lender beyond the fixed contractual
obligations.
requirements.object: the lender beyond the fixed contractual obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The bank should be under no obligation to remit funds to the transferee(s) until
it has received funds generated from the underlying loans.
requirements.object: to remit funds to the transferee(s) until it has received funds generated from the underlying loans

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The bank shall hold in trust, on behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising
from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with its own
cash flows.
requirements.object: behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with i

conditions: Provided that if the above conditions are not satisfied
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if the above conditions are not satisfied, the transferor bank shall
maintain capital on the loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing
facility is being provided are held by it directly on its books.
requirements.object: loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing facility is being provided are held by it directly on its book

requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions referred to in Paragraph 33 above shall be governed by the
respective regulatory frameworks as contained in Part C of these directions.
requirements.object: respective regulatory frameworks as contained in Part C of these directions

requirements.full_sentence:
However,
in all such cases, the provisions of Chapter II of Part A shall continue to apply except
in cases where the respective regulatory framework (as contained in Part C of these
directions) provides for otherwise.
requirements.object: in cases where the respective regulatory framework (as contained in Part C of these directions) provides for otherwise

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks should formulate a board approved policy to ensure that the gap between
time of transfer and due-diligence cut-off date should be minimal and no loans in
default is transferred under provisions of this Chapter.
requirements.object: policy to ensure that the gap between time of transfer and due-diligence cut-off date should be minimal and no loans in def

conditions:
where loan transfers result in a change of lender of record under a
loan agreement
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where loan transfers result in a change of lender of record under a
loan agreement, the transferor and transferee(s) should ensure that the existing loan
agreement has suitable enabling provisions including consent by the underlying
borrower that allow for such transactions by laying down the required ground rules.
requirements.object: loan agreement has suitable enabling provisions including consent by the underlying borrower that allow for such transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
Transferor's retention of economic interest, if any, in the loans transferred
should be supported by legally valid documentation.
requirements.object: valid documentation
record by the transferor: (1) legal validity of amount of economic interest retained by the transferor

conditions: If a transfer involves multiple transferees

if any of the transferees is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level
requirements.full_sentence:
and
(4) the arrangement does not result in the transferor becoming an agent, trustee,
or fiduciary of the transferee(s), except:
Explanation 1: If a transfer involves multiple transferees, the minimum retention
requirement by the transferor, if any of the transferees is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level, shall be on the entire amount of transferred loans,
including the portions transferred to transferees who are able to perform due diligence
at the individual loan level.
requirements.object: amount of transferred loans, including the portions transferred to transferees who are able to perform due diligence at the individua

requirements.full_sentence:
The action may,
inter alia, include modification to exposure ceilings in respect of certain types of asset
classes, change in ceilings applicable to transferor, etc.
requirements.object: modification to exposure ceilings in respect of certain types of asset classes, change in ceilings applicable to transferor, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, transferee(s)
should put in place formal policies and procedures appropriate to and commensurate
with the risk profile of the loans acquired.
requirements.object: policies and procedures appropriate to and commensurate with the risk profile of the loans acquired

requirements.full_sentence:
Such procedures should be as rigorous as
that followed by them for portfolios of similar loans directly originated by them.
requirements.object: that followed by them for portfolios of similar loans directly originated by them

conditions:
if not collected directly by the banks and
obtained from the servicing facility agent
requirements.full_sentence:
The
information required for these procedures, if not collected directly by the banks and
obtained from the servicing facility agent, if any, should be certified by the authorized
officials of the servicing facility agent.
requirements.object: authorized officials of the servicing facility agent

requirements.full_sentence:
Depending upon the size of the portfolio, credit monitoring procedures may
include verification of the information submitted by the servicing facility agent's
concurrent and internal auditors.
requirements.object: information submitted by the servicing facility agent's concurrent and internal auditors

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The servicing facility agreement should provide for such verifications by the
auditors of the transferee(s), and wherever applicable, the transferor.
requirements.object: by the auditors of the transferee(s), and wherever applicable, the transferor

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All relevant information and audit reports should be available for verification by
the supervisors from RBI during the supervision of the transferee(s) and transferor.
requirements.object: by the supervisors from RBI during the supervision of the transferee(s) and transferor

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall not be any difference in the criteria for credit underwriting applied
by the transferor to exposures transferred and those held or retained on their book.
requirements.object: the criteria for credit underwriting applied by the transferor to exposures transferred and those held or retained on their book

conditions: where relevant
requirements.full_sentence:
To
this end, similar processes for approving and, where relevant, amending, renewing
and monitoring of credit facilities extended should be applied by the transferor for all
the loan exposures originated by it.
requirements.object: transferor for all the loan exposures originated by it

requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer shall be only on cash basis and the consideration shall be received
not later than at the time of transfer of loans.
requirements.object: basis and the consideration shall be received not later than at the time of transfer of loans

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of this paragraph shall be
without derogation of the provisions of paragraph 19, which pertains to retained
economic interest.
requirements.object: the provisions of paragraph 19, which pertains to retained economic interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The transfer consideration should be arrived at in a transparent manner on an
arm's length basis.
requirements.object: a transparent manner on an arm's length basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence in respect of the loans cannot be outsourced by the
transferee(s) and should be carried out by its own staff with the same rigour and as
per the same policies as would have been done for originating any loan.
requirements.object: its own staff with the same rigour and as per the same policies as would have been done for originating any loan

requirements.full_sentence:
The above due diligence requirements shall be applicable at the level of each
loan.
requirements.object: level of each loan

conditions: In case of loans acquired as a portfolio
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans acquired as a portfolio, if a transferee is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level for the entire portfolio but can perform due
<image>
diligence at the individual loan level for not less than one-third of the portfolio by value
and number of loans in the portfolio, then due diligence may be performed at the
portfolio level for the remaining, and the transferor has to retain at least 10 per cent of
economic interest in the transferred loans.
requirements.object: portfolio level for the remaining, and the transferor has to retain at least 10 per cent of economic interest in the transferred l

requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer of stressed loans must be done through assignment or novation
only;
requirements.object: or novation only
the following aspects: (1) Norms and procedure for transfer or acquisition of such loans

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on transfer of stressed loans shall be based on the following
principles:
(1) The process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may
be determined by a bank's policy, for transfer shall follow a top-down approach i.e.,
the head office/corporate office of the bank shall be actively involved in identification
of stressed loans for transfer;
requirements.object: following principles: (1) The process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may be determined by a bank's p

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At a minimum, all loans classified as NPA above a threshold amount decided
by the Board/Board Committee shall be reviewed by the Board/Board Committee at
periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or
otherwise.
requirements.object: Board/Board Committee at periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or otherwise

requirements.full_sentence:
The loans identified for transfer shall be listed for the purpose of transfer as
indicated above.
requirements.object: purpose of transfer as indicated above

requirements.full_sentence:
Transferors should have clear policies with regard to valuation of loan
exposures proposed to be transferred.
requirements.object: regard to valuation of loan exposures proposed to be transferred

requirements.full_sentence:
The basis or the grounds which will determine
the type of valuation used - internal or external - must be clearly specified in the policy.
requirements.object: the policy

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
The discount rate used by the transferor in the internal valuation exercise shall also be
spelt out in the policy.
requirements.object: in the policy

requirements.full_sentence:
This may be either cost of equity or average cost of funds or
opportunity cost or some other relevant rate, subject to a floor of the contracted interest
rate charged.
requirements.object: equity or average cost of funds or opportunity cost or some other relevant rate

conditions:
in case the credit exposure being transferred (without netting
for provisions)
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case the credit exposure being transferred (without netting
for provisions), singly, jointly, or severally, is ₹100 crore or more, the transferor shall
obtain two external valuation reports.
requirements.object: reports

requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of valuation exercise, external or
otherwise, shall be borne by the transferor.
requirements.object: transferor

requirements.full_sentence:
In general, bank shall transfer stressed loans, including through bilateral sales,
only to permitted transferees and ARCs.
requirements.object: through bilateral sales, only to permitted transferees and ARCs

requirements.full_sentence:
The manner of transfer must be in terms of the Board approved policy of the
transferor.
requirements.object: the Board approved policy of the transferor

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks may also use e-auction platforms, wherever available, for
transferring their loans.

conditions: when negotiated on a bilateral basis
requirements.full_sentence:
However, when negotiated on a bilateral basis, such negotiations must
necessarily be followed by an auction through Swiss Challenge method if the
aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borrower/s
whose loan is being transferred is ₹100 crore or more.
requirements.object: an auction through Swiss Challenge method if the aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borro

requirements.full_sentence:
In all other cases, the bilateral
negotiations shall be subject to the price discovery and value maximisation
approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the Board approved policy described
in paragraph 57, which may also include Swiss Challenge method.
requirements.object: price discovery and value maximisation approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the Board approved policy described in paragr

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case of transfer of stressed loans undertaken as a resolution plan
under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 with the approval of signatories to the intercreditor agreement (ICA)
representing 75 per cent by value of total outstanding credit facilities (fund based as
well non-fund based) and 60 per cent of signatories by number, for the exit of all
signatories to the ICA from the stressed loan exposure, Swiss Challenge method
would be mandatory irrespective of the above exposure threshold.
requirements.object: of stressed loans undertaken as a resolution plan under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Asset

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall ensure that subsequent to transfer of the stressed loans,
they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the
transferred loans including additional funding or commitments to the borrower /
transferee(s) with reference to the loan transferred.
requirements.object: transfer of the stressed loans, they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the transfe

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, fresh exposure may
<image>
be taken on the borrower after a cooling period laid down in the respective Board
approved policy of the transferor, which in any case, shall not be less than 12 months
from the date of such transfer.
requirements.object: months from the date of such transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
Acquisition of loan exposures
by such companies shall be subject to the relevant provisions of the Companies Act,
2013.
requirements.object: relevant provisions of the Companies Act, 2013

conditions: In case such transferee(s) are neither ARC nor permitted transferee
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case such transferee(s) are neither ARC nor permitted transferee, the
transfer shall be additionally subject to the following conditions:
requirements.object: the following conditions:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The transferee entity should be incorporated in India or registered with a
financial sector regulator in India (Securities and Exchange Board of India,
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, Pension Fund
Regulatory and Development Authority, and International Financial Services
Centers Authority).
requirements.object: or registered with a financial sector regulator in India (Securities and Exchange Board of India, Insurance Regulatory and De

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The transferee(s) should not be classified as a non-performing account (NPA)
by any lending institution at the time of such transfer;
requirements.object: non-performing account (NPA) by any lending institution at the time of such transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The transferee(s) should not fund the loan acquisition through loans from
lenders specified at paragraph 13(4).
requirements.object: through loans from lenders specified at paragraph 13(4)

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The lenders specified at paragraph 13(4) should not take any credit/investment
exposure apart from working capital facilities (which are not in the nature of term
loans) to the borrower whose loan account is transferred, for at least three years
from the date of such transfer.
requirements.object: apart from working capital facilities (which are not in the nature of term loans) to the borrower whose loan accou

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the working capital facilities are sanctioned by the banks which
are not transferors.
requirements.object: are sanctioned by the banks which are not transferors

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Further, for at least three years from the date of such transfer, the lenders
specified at paragraph 13(4) should not take any credit/investment exposure to
the transferee(s) for deployment, either directly or indirectly, into the operations
of the borrower.
requirements.object: to the transferee(s) for deployment, either directly or indirectly, into the operations of the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, borrower shall mean the legal entities to which
the transferor(s) had exposure which was transferred to the transferee(s) as a
requirements.object: to which the transferor(s) had exposure which was transferred to the transferee(s) as a

requirements.full_sentence:
part of the resolution plan, and may include, but is not limited to, a special
purpose vehicle having a legal-entity status set up for a project.
requirements.object: limited to, a special purpose vehicle having a legal-entity status set up for a project

requirements.full_sentence:
The respective financial sector regulators shall put in place a
framework for this purpose in consultation with the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: framework for this purpose in consultation with the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor(s) must provide adequate time for due diligence by prospective
acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan.
requirements.object: due diligence by prospective acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan transfer agreement shall clearly specify that in the event an ICA is
required to be signed in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 the transferee shall sign the ICA as
and when required.
requirements.object: the event an ICA is required to be signed in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Ass

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor(s) shall ensure that no transfer of a stressed loan is made at a
contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price,
the transferor(s) would have to bear a part of the shortfall.
requirements.object: of a stressed loan is made at a contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price, the

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall transfer the stressed loans to transferee(s) other than ARCs
only on cash basis.
requirements.object: to transferee(s) other than ARCs only on cash basis

conditions:
If a portfolio of stressed homogeneous personal loans acquired is treated
as a single asset by the transferee
requirements.full_sentence:
The entire transfer consideration should be received not later than
Explanation: If a portfolio of stressed homogeneous personal loans acquired is treated
as a single asset by the transferee, the portfolio shall be treated as a single asset for
the purpose of Paragraph 73 as well.
requirements.object: single asset for the purpose of Paragraph 73 as well

conditions: If the transferee(s)
requirements.full_sentence:
If the transferee(s), except ARCs, have no existing exposure to the borrower
whose stressed loan account is acquired, the acquired stressed loan shall be classified
as "Standard" by the transferee(s).
requirements.object: by the transferee(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Thereafter, the asset classification status of the
loan acquired, shall be determined by the record of recovery in the books of the
transferee(s) with reference to cash flows estimated at the time of transfer of the loan.
requirements.object: record of recovery in the books of the transferee(s) with reference to cash flows estimated at the time of transfer of the loan

conditions: In case the transferee(s)
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the transferee(s), except ARCs, have existing exposure to the borrower
whose stressed loan account is acquired, the asset classification of the acquired
exposure shall be the same as the existing asset classification of the borrower with the
transferee.
requirements.object: the existing asset classification of the borrower with the transferee

requirements.full_sentence:
This treatment shall be applicable even if such acquisition is pursuant to
the transferee being a successful resolution applicant under the Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
requirements.object: such acquisition is pursuant to the transferee being a successful resolution applicant under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code,

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank acquiring stressed loans shall make provisions for such loans as per
the asset classification status in its books upon acquisition.
requirements.object: loans as per the asset classification status in its books upon acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions of this Part shall be applicable to Co-Lending Arrangements
(CLAs) entered into by Commercial Banks with the following set of regulated entities
(REs):
(1) Other Commercial Banks (excluding Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and
Regional Rural Banks);
requirements.object: Arrangements (CLAs) entered into by Commercial Banks with the following set of regulated entities (REs): (1) Other Commerc

requirements.full_sentence:
Digital lending arrangements shall continue to be governed by Reserve Bank
of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 as amended from time
to time.
requirements.object: by Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, any digital lending arrangement involving co-lending by the REs shall,
without derogation to Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities)
Directions, 2025, be guided by the provisions of these Directions.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, be guided by the provisions of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions of this part shall not apply to loans sanctioned under multiple
banking, consortium lending, or syndication.
requirements.object: under multiple banking, consortium lending, or syndication

requirements.full_sentence:
Save as otherwise permitted in terms of these Directions, no bank shall enter
into any CLA which is not compliant with these Directions.
requirements.object: which is not compliant with these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks under a CLA shall be required to retain a minimum 10 per cent share of
the individual loans in its books.
requirements.object: a minimum 10 per cent share of the individual loans in its books

requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy of banks shall suitably incorporate provisions relating to CLAs,
including the internal limit for the proportion of their lending portfolio under CLAs;
requirements.object: to CLAs, including the internal limit for the proportion of their lending portfolio under CLAs

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement to be entered between the CLA partners shall include detailed
terms and conditions of the arrangement;
requirements.object: conditions of the arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Lending service shall refer to the set of activities related to lending such
as customer acquisition, underwriting, pricing, servicing, monitoring, and recovery of
specific loan or loan portfolio, etc.
requirements.object: of activities related to lending such as customer acquisition, underwriting, pricing, servicing, monitoring, and recovery of specific

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan agreement signed with the borrower shall make an upfront disclosure
regarding the segregation of the roles and responsibilities (such as sourcing, and
servicing) of concerned REs, including clear identification of the entity being the single
point of interface with the customer.
requirements.object: regarding the segregation of the roles and responsibilities (such as sourcing, and servicing) of concerned REs, including c

requirements.full_sentence:
Any subsequent change in customer interface
shall only be done after prior intimation to the borrower.
requirements.object: prior intimation to the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan-agreement shall also
appropriately disclose suitable provisions related to customer protection, and
grievance redressal mechanism.
requirements.object: provisions related to customer protection, and grievance redressal mechanism

requirements.full_sentence:
All required details of CLA shall be disclosed appropriately to the concerned
borrower as laid down on 'Key Facts Statement (KFS) for Loans & Advances' under
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Responsible Business Conduct)
Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: the concerned borrower as laid down on 'Key Facts Statement (KFS) for Loans & Advances' under Reserve Bank of India (Com

requirements.full_sentence:
The interest rate and any other fees / charges on the underlying loans charged
to the borrower shall be based on the contractual agreement, subject to the regulatory
norms applicable to the REs.
requirements.object: contractual agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
Specifically, the final interest rate charged to the
borrower shall be the blended interest rate which is calculated as an average rate of
interest derived from the interest rates charged by respective REs, as per their internal
lending policies and risk profile of the same or similar borrower, weighted by the
proportionate funding share of concerned REs under CLA.
requirements.object: rate which is calculated as an average rate of interest derived from the interest rates charged by respective REs, as per thei

requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in rates by respective REs under CLA will be made as per their
credit policy and extant regulatory norms, and the same shall be reflected in the
updated blended rate and communicated to the borrower.
requirements.object: updated blended rate and communicated to the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Any fees / charges payable by the borrower in addition to the blended interest
rate shall be incorporated in computation of annual percentage rate (APR) and
disclosed appropriately in the KFS as prescribed in the paragraph 105 of these
Directions.
requirements.object: of annual percentage rate (APR) and disclosed appropriately in the KFS as prescribed in the paragraph 105 of these Dire

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of the credit policy, the bank shall lay down the objective criteria for fees/
charges payable for lending services, depending upon relevant factors such as the
nature of service provided, quantum of loan, etc.
requirements.object: criteria for fees/ charges payable for lending services, depending upon relevant factors such as the nature of service provided

requirements.full_sentence:
Such fees/ charges shall not involve,
directly or indirectly, any element of credit enhancement/ default loss guarantee unless
permitted otherwise.
requirements.object: any element of credit enhancement/ default loss guarantee unless permitted otherwise

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation
(1) Credit enhancement shall have the same meaning as defined in Part A of this
Direction.
requirements.object: as defined in Part A of this Direction

requirements.full_sentence:
Any other implicit guarantee of similar nature
linked to the performance of the loan portfolio of the RE and specified upfront, shall
also be covered under the definition of DLG
requirements.object: the definition of DLG

requirements.full_sentence:
The CLA shall entail an irrevocable commitment on the part of partner RE to
take into its books, on back to back basis, its share of the individual loans as originated
by the originating RE.
requirements.object: on the part of partner RE to take into its books, on back to back basis, its share of the individual loans as origina

requirements.full_sentence:
The CLA shall ensure that the respective shares of the REs are reflected in the
books of both REs without delay after disbursement by the originating RE to the
borrower, in any case not later than 15 calendar days from the date of disbursement.
requirements.object: shares of the REs are reflected in the books of both REs without delay after disbursement by the originating RE to the borr

requirements.full_sentence:
Originating bank shall also ensure that it transfers the loan under CLA only to
the partner RE, as per the ex-ante agreement and as specified in the KFS at the time
of sanction of loan.
requirements.object: transfers the loan under CLA only to the partner RE, as per the ex-ante agreement and as specified in the KFS at the time of sanct

requirements.timeline: within 15 calendar days for any reason
requirements.full_sentence:
If the originating bank is unable to transfer the share of the exposure to the
partner RE under CLA within 15 calendar days for any reason, then the loan/s shall
remain on the books of the originating bank and can be transferred to other eligible
lenders only under the provisions of Part A of this Direction.
requirements.object: of the originating bank and can be transferred to other eligible lenders only under the provisions of Part A of this Direction

requirements.full_sentence:
Each RE (including bank) shall maintain a borrower's account individually for
its respective share.
requirements.object: individually for its respective share

requirements.full_sentence:
All transactions (disbursements / repayments) between the REs, as well as with
the borrower, shall be routed through an escrow account maintained with a bank
(which could also be one of the REs involved in CLA).
requirements.object: escrow account maintained with a bank (which could also be one of the REs involved in CLA)

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall clearly
specify the manner of appropriation between the originating and partner REs.
requirements.object: of appropriation between the originating and partner REs

requirements.full_sentence:
The loans under the CLA shall be included in the scope of internal/ statutory
audit in each RE to ensure adherence to their respective internal guidelines, terms of
the agreement and applicable regulatory requirements.
requirements.object: scope of internal/ statutory audit in each RE to ensure adherence to their respective internal guidelines, terms of the agreement a

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall implement a business continuity plan to ensure uninterrupted
service to their borrowers till repayment of the loans, in the event of termination of CLA
between the REs.
requirements.object: plan to ensure uninterrupted service to their borrowers till repayment of the loans, in the event of termination of CL

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank involved under CLA shall comply with the prescribed norms under the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025
as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: norms under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Bank may rely upon the originating RE for "Customer
Identification Process" as per the provisions of the said Directions on KYC.
requirements.object: RE for "Customer Identification Process" as per the provisions of the said Directions on KYC

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall be guided by the fair practice code and grievance redressal
mechanism as applicable to them.
requirements.object: fair practice code and grievance redressal mechanism as applicable to them

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall adhere to the extant requirements of reporting to CICs for their
share of the loan account, as per the provisions of the Credit Information Companies
(Regulation) Act, 2005 and the Rules and Regulations issued by RBI therein, from time
to time.
requirements.object: requirements of reporting to CICs for their share of the loan account, as per the provisions of the Credit Information Companies

requirements.full_sentence:
Originating bank may provide default loss guarantee up to five per cent of loans
outstanding in respect of loans under CLA.
requirements.object: up to five per cent of loans outstanding in respect of loans under CLA

requirements.full_sentence:
Provision of such default loss guarantee
shall be governed mutatis mutandis in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time

conditions:
if either of the REs classifies its
exposure to a borrower under CLA as SMA / NPA on account of default in the CLA
exposure
requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall apply a borrower-level asset classification for their respective
exposures to a borrower under CLA, implying that if either of the REs classifies its
exposure to a borrower under CLA as SMA / NPA on account of default in the CLA
exposure, the same classification shall be applicable to the exposure of the other RE
to the borrower under CLA.
requirements.object: classification for their respective exposures to a borrower under CLA, implying that if either of the REs classifies its

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall put in place a robust mechanism for sharing
relevant information in this regard on a near-real time basis, and in any case latest by
end of the next working day.
requirements.object: robust mechanism for sharing relevant information in this regard on a near-real time basis, and in any case latest by end of the next w

requirements.full_sentence:
Any subsequent transfer of loan exposures originated under CLA to third
parties, or any inter-se transfer of such loan exposures by banks, shall be strictly in
compliance with the provisions of Part A of this Direction.
requirements.object: with the provisions of Part A of this Direction

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the applicable disclosure requirements under extant regulations,
Banks shall also prominently disclose on their website, a list of all active CLA partners.
requirements.object: their website, a list of all active CLA partners

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall also make appropriate disclosures in their financial statements,
under 'Notes to Accounts', relating to necessary details of CLAs on an aggregate
basis.
requirements.object: in their financial statements, under 'Notes to Accounts', relating to necessary details of CLAs on an aggregate basi

requirements.full_sentence:
The details may inter alia include quantum of CLAs, weighted average rate of
interest, fees charged / paid, broad sectors in which CLA was made, performance of
loans under CLA, details related to default loss guarantee, if any, etc.
requirements.object: of CLAs, weighted average rate of interest, fees charged / paid, broad sectors in which CLA was made, performance of loans under CLA, details related to default loss guarantee

requirements.full_sentence:
The disclosure
shall be done on quarterly/annual basis.
requirements.object: basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The banks may evolve appropriate mechanism for adopting sole bank, multiple
bank, consortium or syndication approach, by framing necessary ground rules on
operational aspects.
requirements.object: adopting sole bank, multiple bank, consortium or syndication approach, by framing necessary ground rules on operation

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall strengthen its information back-up about the borrowers enjoying
credit facilities from multiple lenders as under:
(1) At the time of granting fresh facilities, bank shall obtain declaration from the
borrowers about the credit facilities already enjoyed by them from other lenders in the
format specified in Annex I.
requirements.object: about the borrowers enjoying credit facilities from multiple lenders as under: (1) At the time of granting fresh fa

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of existing banks, all the banks shall seek a
declaration from their existing borrowers availing sanctioned limits of rupees five crore
and above or wherever, it is in their knowledge that their borrowers are availing credit
facilities from other lenders and introduce a system of exchange of information with
other lenders as indicated above.
requirements.object: their existing borrowers availing sanctioned limits of rupees five crore and above or wherever, it is in their knowledge that

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Subsequently, banks shall exchange information about the conduct of the
borrowers' accounts with other lenders (participating REs under consortium/ Multiple
Banking Arrangements) in the format given in Annex II at least at quarterly intervals.
requirements.object: conduct of the borrowers' accounts with other lenders (participating REs under consortium/ Multiple Banking Arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The bank shall obtain regular certification by a professional, preferably a Company
Secretary / Cost Accountant / Chartered Accountant regarding compliance of various
statutory prescriptions that are in vogue as per the format specified in Annex III.
requirements.object: a professional, preferably a Company Secretary / Cost Accountant / Chartered Accountant regarding compliance of variou

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Further, the bank shall make greater use of credit reports available from Credit
Information Companies listed under Reserve Bank of India (Credit Information
Companies) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: credit reports available from Credit Information Companies listed under Reserve Bank of India (Credit Information Companies) Direc

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The bank shall also incorporate suitable clauses in the loan agreements in future
(at the time of next renewal in the case of existing facilities) regarding exchange of
credit information so as to address confidentiality issues.
requirements.object: in the loan agreements in future (at the time of next renewal in the case of existing facilities) regarding exchange

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the consortium leader / bank having the largest exposure shall have
the lead role in monitoring the unhedged foreign exchange exposure of entities.
requirements.object: in monitoring the unhedged foreign exchange exposure of entities

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be two categories of Participations namely Inter-Bank Participations
with Risk Sharing and Inter-Bank Participations without Risk Sharing.
requirements.object: Participations namely Inter-Bank Participations with Risk Sharing and Inter-Bank Participations without Risk Sharing

requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate amount of such Participations in
any account should not exceed 40 per cent of the outstanding in the account at the
time of issue.
requirements.object: of the outstanding in the account at the time of issue

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, during the currency of the Participations the aggregate amount
of Participations should be covered by the outstanding balance in the account.
requirements.object: outstanding balance in the account

requirements.full_sentence:
Period of Participation: The minimum period of such a Participation shall be 91
days, while the maximum period shall be 180 days.
requirements.object: the maximum period shall be 180 days

requirements.full_sentence: Transferability: Participations shall not be transferable.

Documentation: A bank should subscribe to the "uniform code for
Participations" prepared by IBA which will spell out clearly their inter-se rights and
obligations in relation to the securities covered by the advances in question.
requirements.object: code for Participations" prepared by IBA which will spell out clearly their inter-se rights and obligations in relation to t

requirements.full_sentence:
The participating bank shall show the aggregate
amount of such Participations as part of its advances.
requirements.object: of such Participations as part of its advances

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no privity of contract between the borrower and the participating bank
and to avoid any difficulty, bank will incorporate in the cash credit agreement of the
borrowers an appropriate clause permitting the lending bank to shift a part of the
advance to any bank, without notice to the borrowers, by way of Participations.
requirements.object: contract between the borrower and the participating bank and to avoid any difficulty, bank will incorporate in the cash credit agreem

requirements.full_sentence:
The
agreement may also provide that in the event of issue of Participations the issuing
bank would continue to represent the participating bank in protecting the latter's
interests.
requirements.object: the event of issue of Participations the issuing bank would continue to represent the participating bank in protecting the latter

requirements.full_sentence:
Period of Participation: The tenure of such Participations shall not exceed 90
days.
Transferability: Participation shall not be transferable.

Accounting: The issuing bank will show the amount of Participations as
borrowing while the participating bank shall show the same under Advances to bank
i.e.
requirements.object: Advances to bank i

requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Data: As a result of outstanding Participations being treated as
borrowings, the issuing bank should report such borrowings in the fortnightly return
under Section 42(2) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
requirements.object: the fortnightly return under Section 42(2) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934

requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be done
by including the amount of Participations, by the issuing bank under 'Borrowings from
banks' i.e.
requirements.object: the amount of Participations, by the issuing bank under 'Borrowings from banks' i

requirements.full_sentence:
The participating bank should include the amount of
Participations taken in advances to banks under item III(c) in Form 'A'.
requirements.object: Participations taken in advances to banks under item III(c) in Form 'A'

requirements.full_sentence:
The amount of
Participations so included in the relative items of Form 'A' should be clearly indicated
<image>
as a foot-note to the return, showing separately also Participations on risk sharing
basis.
requirements.object: as a foot-note to the return, showing separately also Participations on risk sharing basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The banks shall put in place a Board approved policy with regard to take-over
of accounts from another bank at the request/instance of the borrower.
requirements.object: Board approved policy with regard to take-over of accounts from another bank at the request/instance of the borrower

conditions: in case of quick mortality of such cases after takeover
requirements.full_sentence:
The policy may
include norms relating to the nature of the accounts that may be taken over, authority
levels for sanction of takeover, reporting of takeovers to higher authorities, monitoring
mechanism of taken over accounts, credit audit of taken over accounts, examination
of staff accountability especially in case of quick mortality of such cases after takeover,
periodic review of taken over accounts at Board/ Board Committee level, Top
Management level, etc.
requirements.object: the nature of the accounts that may be taken over, authority levels for sanction of takeover, reporting of takeovers to high

requirements.full_sentence:
Before taking over an account, the transferee bank should obtain necessary
credit information from the transferor bank as per the format prescribed in Annex II.
requirements.object: from the transferor bank as per the format prescribed in Annex II

requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor bank, on
receipt of a request from the transferee bank, should share necessary credit
information as per the prescribed format at the earliest.
requirements.object: as per the prescribed format at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

Present outstanding
(In the case of derivatives contracts, negative MTM i.e which is not due for settlement may be indicated)

amount payable to the bank under the contract but not yet paid may be indicated)
<image>

of contracts where the positive MTM value due to the bank remained overdue for more than 90 days and the account had to be classified as NPA ( but later on regularized and is not NPA as on the date of exchange of information)

Note: All cases where any of the contracts has been classified as NPA and continues to be NPA as on the date of the exchange of information should be shown as Below Par)
<1% of total number of
1-5% of total number of contracts
> 5% of total number of contracts
contracts
* No.
requirements.object: Par) <1% of total number of 1-5% of total number of contracts > 5% of total number of contracts contracts * No

requirements.full_sentence:
As Banks quite often deal with unlisted companies, disclosure
requirements for such companies above a specific turnover shall be
made akin to those for listed companies, viz.
requirements.object: those for listed companies, viz

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the following additional certification either from Chartered
Accountant or Company Secretary or Cost Accountants shall also be
thought of :-

As regards rotation of Auditors, for the sake of operational convenience,
it is suggested they shall be changed once every 5 years instead of
every 3 years.
requirements.object: 5 years instead of every 3 years

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to avoid concentration, group companies shall have different
Statutory/ Internal Auditors in case group turnover exceeds Rs.100
